expectations.text: Includes 'config set server_url' with the correct URL
Includes a verification command (config get or config get server_url)
expectations.evidence: Shows 'agent-messenger config get server_url' and 'agent-messenger config get'

expectations.text: Explains that the setting is persistent (saved to config file)
expectations.evidence: States: 'This writes the value to the config file at ~/.agent-messenger/config'
